title: Inkwell model catalog
description: Single source of truth for which models the product supports. Read by the backend at startup and (via a build-time copy) embedded into the extension's bundled fallback. Adding a model is a pure data change here plus a matching provider implementation in backend/src/inkwell_backend/providers/.

default.description: Model id used when a client does not specify one. Must match one of the entries in `models`.

models.description: Ordered list. First entry is the product default if `default` is absent.

id.description: Stable id sent in API requests and stored in extension settings. Supports Portkey model-catalog slugs (e.g. @integration/model).

label.description: Human-readable name shown in the picker.

provider.description: Upstream that serves this model. Must match a registered ModelProvider on the backend.

description.description: One-line blurb shown under the label in the picker.

tier.description: Coarse speed/quality bucket — lets the UI sort/group sensibly.
